title: tephrosia nigerica
intro: Tephrosia nigerica, also known as Black or Nigerian hoarypea, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions of West Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Tephrosia nigerica include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia nigerica include decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
